topics.label: Termination
topics.description: Dismissal, layoff, severance, unjust dismissal, constructive dismissal, group termination

topics.label: Harassment
topics.description: Workplace harassment, sexual harassment, workplace violence, reprisal, investigation

topics.label: Accommodation
topics.description: Disability, mental health, family status, religious accommodation, undue hardship, CHRA

topics.label: Compensation
topics.description: Wages, pay, salary, overtime pay, minimum wage, deductions, vacation pay, holiday pay

topics.label: Leave
topics.description: Maternity, parental, sick, compassionate care, bereavement, personal, family violence leave

topics.label: Hiring
topics.description: Employment contracts, probation, onboarding, offers, independent contractors vs. employees

topics.label: Workplace Safety
topics.description: Occupational health and safety, work refusal, hazards, injuries, safety committee, WHMIS

topics.label: Hours of Work
topics.description: Standard hours, maximum hours, overtime triggers, rest periods, shift scheduling, compressed work weeks

topics.label: Records and Notices
topics.description: Employer record-keeping, required notices, pay statements, posting obligations

topics.label: Unclassified
topics.description: Provisions that do not match a primary topic keyword

risk_levels.label: High Risk
risk_levels.description: Situations that can result in legal proceedings, tribunal complaints, regulatory penalties, or reinstatement orders. Escalation to employment counsel is mandatory.

risk_levels.label: Medium Risk
risk_levels.description: Situations with clear compliance obligations that require documentation and consistent application. Legal review recommended for complex cases.

risk_levels.label: Low Risk
risk_levels.description: Informational or administrative compliance obligations. Still verify current law before acting.

applies_to.label: Employer
applies_to.description: Applies to the employer or employer's agents (management, HR)

applies_to.label: Union / Bargaining Agent
applies_to.description: Applies to a union or certified bargaining agent

applies_to.label: Regulator / Inspector
applies_to.description: Applies to ESDC inspectors, safety officers, or the Canada Industrial Relations Board

jurisdictions.label: Canada (Federal)
jurisdictions.human_rights_act: Canadian Human Rights Act (RSC 1985, c H-6)
jurisdictions.scope: Federally regulated employers: banking, airlines, telecom, broadcasting, interprovincial transport, pipelines, federal Crown corporations
jurisdictions.enforcement_body: Employment and Social Development Canada (ESDC) — Labour Program

jurisdictions.label: Ontario
jurisdictions.human_rights_act: Ontario Human Rights Code (RSO 1990, c H.19)
jurisdictions.scope: All Ontario employers not federally regulated
jurisdictions.enforcement_body: Ontario Ministry of Labour, Immigration, Training and Skills Development

jurisdictions.label: Quebec
jurisdictions.primary_act: Act Respecting Labour Standards (CQLR c N-1.1)
jurisdictions.human_rights_act: Quebec Charter of Human Rights and Freedoms (CQLR c C-12)
jurisdictions.scope: All Quebec employers not federally regulated
jurisdictions.enforcement_body: Commission des normes, de l'équité, de la santé et de la sécurité du travail (CNESST)

jurisdictions.label: British Columbia
jurisdictions.scope: All BC employers not federally regulated

jurisdictions.label: Alberta
jurisdictions.human_rights_act: Alberta Human Rights Act (RSA 2000, c A-25.5)
jurisdictions.scope: All Alberta employers not federally regulated

sources.label: Work Place Harassment and Violence Prevention Regulations
